system.description: The elements unleashed, raging, and somewhat paternalistic.
system.title: God of Thunder

scriptures.name: Level 1: Lightning Blast
scriptures.description: Ranged attack, single target, long range. Can attack one target for each of your levels in this god.

specials.name: Target suffers Disadvantage on next action

scriptures.name: Level 2: Stormdancer
scriptures.description: If you're beneath a cloudy sky, you and the party are transformed into lightning bolts and propelled in the sky. You return to the earth at a place of your choosing, anywhere beneath the same sky.

specials.name: GM answers question about land below
Someone's hair stands vertical all day

scriptures.name: Level 3: Summon Lightning
scriptures.description: When in an area with a storm, you can attack with a huge lightning strike.

specials.name: If Wounds, deal two Wounds instead
